title: crun-wasm: Add missing test to podman CI for testing `wasm/wasi` workload.
body: Following PR https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/16434 went in without any tests in CI. Since we need `crun-wasm` package in CI order to test this. So please add a dedicated test for this.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@flouthoc any chance to work on this one?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@flouthoc this should be added now.  @cevich do we have crun-wasm in CI/CD system now?

> do we have crun-wasm in CI/CD system now?

I just checked, it's not there.  I'll open a PR to add it, but integrating the images will need to wait until after https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/17305 merges.

Ref: https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/255
@cevich Thanks as soon as it is done, I'll add a test for this in CI.

`c20230220t163742z-f37f36d12` is the new `IMAGE_SUFFIX`, though you'll need to wait and/or rebase on https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/17305 for it to work - script & test updates are needed to support the new Debian VMs.
